versions.changelog_entry: Initial prompt: 20-step implementation plan across 6 phases (Quick Wins, DRY Extraction, Decomposition, Testing, Structural, Cache Fix) addressing all 16 refactoring issues and 9 code review findings from the Apr 22, 2026 review reports.

Fresh implementation plan based on Run 7 review reports. 27 steps across 7 phases (A-G). All items from v0.1.0 that were already implemented are removed; new findings from Runs 6-7 added. No deferrals. Major additions: ConvergenceInput API collapse, HypothesisTest freeze, xxhash migration, LazyFrame return refactor.
